query: SELECT id, title, regulationType, celexId, effectiveDate, description FROM regulations WHERE title LIKE '%EUDR%' OR title LIKE '%Deforestation%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute SELECT id, title, regulationType, celexId, effectiveDate, description FROM regulations WHERE title LIKE '%EUDR%' OR title LIKE '%Deforestation%' LIMIT 5;

rows.title: EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR)
rows.description: Ensures products sold in EU are not linked to deforestation or forest degradation.

stdout:
id	title	regulationType	celexId	effectiveDate	description
30006	EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR)	EUDR	32023-1115	2023-06-29 00:00:00	Ensures products sold in EU are not linked to deforestation or forest degradation.
